violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not stored in a clean, dry location a minimum of 6 inches above the floor. Food being stored on the walk-in cooler and walk-in freezer door.

General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of food contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. Cardboard in the fridge holding the cheese in the door is not a cleanable surface.

General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Food contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in good repair or sound condition. Gasket on the inside of the pizza prep cooler is broken and hanging off the door.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Microwave in the kitchen has a build up of debris on the inside and needs to be cleaned.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Shelving in the walk-in cooler needs to be cleaned.

Storage of cleaned equipment and utensils. — --Clean equipment/utensil was not covered or inverted during storage. Pizza pans located on top of the prep station had the food surface facing towards the ceiling.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Floors in the walk-in cooler under where the food is stored needs to be cleaned.

Control of insects, rodents, and other pests. — --Insect electrocution or trapping device was installed in an inappropriate location. Fly strip located above the pizza prep station needs to be moved away from the prep area.
